history_text: 57-year-old female with a 8-year history of Type 2 diabetes mellitus, currently poorly controlled (HbA1c 9.8%). Comorbidities include obstructive sleep apnoea, T2DM with hyperglycaemia, hypertension. Renal function is mildly to moderately reduced (eGFR 69.1 mL/min/1.73m²). Current medications include Insulin detemir 18 units nightly, Rosuvastatin 10mg nightly, Amlodipine 5mg once daily. No known drug allergies. She denies recent hospitalisations or surgical procedures.
